{"id":"dotfiles-gmb.8","title":"Clean up thbemacs: remove agenda refs, org-clock, dead code, archive function","description":"In thbemacs init.el: (1) Remove org-agenda from splash screen hints (SPC o a line). (2) Remove org-clock keybindings (SPC m c prefix, lines ~793-801). (3) Delete commented-out capture templates (lines ~837-854). (4) Remove thb/org-archive-done-tasks function and its keybinding (SPC m s D). (5) Remove org-download package (unused in thbemacs — the function that needs it lives in Doom only). Keep org-download in Doom.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"tb@lotus.yt","created_at":"2026-03-05T01:05:40Z","created_by":"Tahir Butt","updated_at":"2026-03-05T01:05:40Z"}

{"id":"dotfiles-gmb.9","title":"Remove custom-functions.el from Doom","description":"custom-functions.el contains thb/org-attach-file-to-references (depends on org-download from +dragndrop), thb/org-save-transcript, and thb/process-transcript-file. These are no longer needed. Remove the file and the (load! custom-functions) from config.el. Keep org-download available via the +dragndrop flag (which is being removed separately — need to add org-download to packages.el directly if we want to keep it).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"tb@lotus.yt","created_at":"2026-03-05T01:05:44Z","created_by":"Tahir Butt","updated_at":"2026-03-05T01:05:44Z"}

{"id":"dotfiles-gmb.2","title":"Remove ophints, vi-tilde-fringe, file-templates, snippets from Doom","description":"Prune unused Doom modules: ophints (operation highlight), vi-tilde-fringe (~ after EOF), file-templates (auto-snippets for empty files), snippets (yasnippet), vterm (use external Ghostty). Ensure org-tempo still works for org block completion after removing snippets.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"tb@lotus.yt","created_at":"2026-03-05T00:55:21Z","created_by":"Tahir Butt","updated_at":"2026-03-05T00:55:42Z"}

{"id":"dotfiles-gmb.3","title":"Remove nano-theme from both configs","description":"nano-theme is declared as a package in both Doom (packages.el) and thbemacs but neither config actually loads it. doom-theme is modus-operandi/vivendi. Remove the package declaration from both.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"tb@lotus.yt","created_at":"2026-03-05T00:59:58Z","created_by":"Tahir Butt","updated_at":"2026-03-05T00:59:58Z"}

{"id":"dotfiles-gmb.10","title":"Remove lsp-enable-snippet and fix consult-fd-args in Doom","description":"In performance-config.el: remove lsp-enable-snippet nil (yasnippet being removed). In dev-config.el: fix or remove consult-fd-args append — newer consult uses a string not a list, so the append may be silently broken.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"tb@lotus.yt","created_at":"2026-03-05T01:05:46Z","created_by":"Tahir Butt","updated_at":"2026-03-05T01:05:46Z"}

{"id":"dotfiles-gmb.11","title":"Clean up Doom custom.el","description":"custom.el has stale M-x customize output: (1) default face override with hardcoded colors that fight modus-themes. (2) ignored-local-variable-values for eglot JS/TS config — no JS/TS language module is enabled. Remove both custom-set-faces and the stale variable. Keep the file for future M-x customize output but clear stale entries.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"tb@lotus.yt","created_at":"2026-03-05T01:09:01Z","created_by":"Tahir Butt","updated_at":"2026-03-05T01:09:01Z"}

{"id":"dotfiles-gmb.1","title":"Remove org-agenda and TODO capture templates from both configs","description":"Migrating task management from todo.org to beads. Remove: org-agenda custom commands, org-super-agenda config, TODO-related capture templates, agenda keybindings. Applies to both thbemacs and Doom. Keep org-mode itself for notes/roam/babel. org-super-agenda package can be removed entirely.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"tb@lotus.yt","created_at":"2026-03-05T00:50:41Z","created_by":"Tahir Butt","updated_at":"2026-03-05T00:50:41Z"}

{"id":"dotfiles-gmb.4","title":"Remove org-depend and simplify TODO keywords","description":"With beads handling task management, org-depend (BLOCKER property) is unnecessary. Remove require org-depend from org-config.el. Simplify TODO keywords from the full state machine (ICEBOX/BACKLOG/TO-DO/TODO/IN-PROGRESS/PAUSED/BLOCKED/DONE/CANCELLED) to basic TODO/DONE for notes. Reduce org-log settings accordingly. Applies to both configs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"tb@lotus.yt","created_at":"2026-03-05T01:00:01Z","created_by":"Tahir Butt","updated_at":"2026-03-05T01:00:01Z"}

{"id":"dotfiles-gmb.6","title":"Remove +dragndrop from Doom org module flags","description":"Not using drag-and-drop file attachment. Change org module from (org +pretty +roam +dragndrop +pandoc) to (org +pretty +roam +pandoc). The +roam flag will be evaluated separately as part of vulpea migration.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"tb@lotus.yt","created_at":"2026-03-05T01:00:06Z","created_by":"Tahir Butt","updated_at":"2026-03-05T01:00:06Z"}
